name: Acid Splash
description: Hurl acid at one or two creatures within range.

name: Blade Ward
description: You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from weapon attacks.

name: Chill Touch
description: Create a ghostly skeletal hand that deals necrotic damage and prevents healing.

name: Dancing Lights
description: Create up to four torch-sized lights that move at your command.

name: Eldritch Blast
description: A beam of crackling energy deals force damage.

name: Fire Bolt
description: A mote of fire deals fire damage and can ignite flammable unattended objects.

name: Guidance
description: Target adds 1d4 to one ability check of its choice.

name: Light
description: Object shines bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light 20 feet beyond.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral hand manipulates objects up to 10 pounds.

name: Mending
description: Repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch.

name: Minor Illusion
description: Create a small sound or image illusion.

name: Poison Spray
description: A puff of noxious gas deals poison damage on failed save.

name: Prestidigitation
description: Perform minor magical tricks and harmless sensory effects.

name: Produce Flame
description: Create flame in hand for light or a thrown fire attack.

name: Ray of Frost
description: A frigid beam deals cold damage and reduces speed.

name: Resistance
description: Target adds 1d4 to one saving throw of its choice.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Radiant flame descends on a creature that fails a Dexterity save.

name: Shillelagh
description: Imbue club or quarterstaff with magical force using spellcasting ability.

name: Shocking Grasp
description: Lightning touch attack prevents target reactions.

name: Thaumaturgy
description: Manifest minor divine wonders: booming voice, tremors, and sensory effects.

name: True Strike
description: Gain brief insight into target defenses.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: Psychic insult deals damage and grants disadvantage on next attack.

name: Bane
description: Enemies subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.

name: Bless
description: Allies add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.

name: Burning Hands
description: A cone of fire deals fire damage on failed Dexterity save.

name: Charm Person
description: Attempt to charm a humanoid that fails a Wisdom save.

name: Chromatic Orb
description: Ranged spell attack dealing chosen elemental damage type.

name: Command
description: Issue one-word command that target obeys on failed Wisdom save.

name: Comprehend Languages
description: Understand spoken and written languages.

name: Cure Wounds
description: Restore hit points to a touched creature.

name: Detect Magic
description: Sense presence of magic within 30 feet.

name: Disguise Self
description: Alter appearance with an illusion.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Outline creatures in light, granting advantage to attackers.

name: False Life
description: Gain temporary hit points.

name: Feather Fall
description: Slow falling creatures to prevent damage.

name: Find Familiar
description: Summon a spirit that takes animal form as a familiar.

name: Guiding Bolt
description: Radiant bolt deals damage and grants advantage to next attack.

name: Healing Word
description: Restore hit points at range as a bonus action.

name: Hex
description: Curse a target for extra damage and disadvantage on chosen ability checks.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: Mark prey for extra weapon damage and tracking advantage.

name: Identify
description: Learn magical properties of an item or spell affecting a creature.

name: Inflict Wounds
description: Melee spell attack deals heavy necrotic damage.

name: Mage Armor
description: Target's base AC becomes 13 + DEX modifier.

name: Magic Missile
description: Automatically hits with three force darts.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
description: Protect target from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead.

name: Ray of Sickness
description: Ranged spell attack deals poison damage and may poison target.

name: Shield
description: Gain +5 AC against triggering attack and block magic missile.

name: Silent Image
description: Create a visual illusion within a 15-foot cube.

name: Sleep
description: Put creatures with low current HP into magical slumber.

name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
description: A creature collapses into laughter, becoming incapacitated on failed save.

name: Thunderwave
description: A thunderous wave deals damage and pushes creatures.

name: Unseen Servant
description: Create an invisible force to perform simple tasks.

name: Witch Bolt
description: A sustained arc of lightning deals ongoing damage.
